_comment: Ground-truth hand-labels for the feature-detection eval (ADR-006). Keyed by tile_id (FK into manifest.json). Each feature uses the FIXED vocabulary (known_labels.json: chimney/vent/skylight/dormer/satellite_dish) and bbox_norm [x0,y0,x1,y1] in [0,1] image space (same convention as Feature.bbox_norm in shared/pipeline_schema.json). Hand-labeling is MANUAL human work (see LABELING_PROTOCOL.md); the seed entries below are SAMPLES the human replaces. At least one tile must have no features (a true negative) so precision is meaningful.
